requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Safety — EV Charging Equipment (General)
requirement_topic.zh: 低压安全——电动汽车充电设备（通用）
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓安全——電動汽車充電設備（通用）

summary.en: EV charging equipment placed on the Portugal/EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU, ensuring it is designed and manufactured to be safe when correctly installed and maintained. Equipment must meet the Essential Safety Requirements (Annex I) covering protection against electric shock, insulation, overcurrent/overtemperature protection, and clearances. Harmonised standard EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Mode 1–4 conductive charging, AC and DC, general requirements) provides a presumption of conformity. In Portugal, ASAE and DGConsumidor are the market surveillance authorities for product safety compliance with LVD.
summary.zh: 在葡萄牙/欧盟市场销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合低压指令2014/35/EU，确保其在正确安装及维护条件下安全运行。设备须满足附件I基本安全要求，涵盖防触电、绝缘、过流/过温保护及电气间隙。协调标准EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4传导充电，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在葡萄牙，ASAE和DGConsumidor是负责LVD产品安全合规的市场监管机构。
summary.zht: 在葡萄牙/歐盟市場銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU，確保其在正確安裝及維護條件下安全運行。設備須滿足附件I基本安全要求，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、過流/過溫保護及電氣間隙。協調標準EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4傳導充電，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在葡萄牙，ASAE和DGConsumidor是負責LVD產品安全合規的市場監管機構。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-1:2019 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporates national deviations. It is enforced under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB/T 18487.1 testing and certification by a Chinese CNAS-accredited lab is NOT recognised as equivalent to EN IEC 61851-1 testing under the EU LVD conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国常见参考标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关但含有国家偏差，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会监督执行。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 18487.1出具的检测及认证，不被欧盟LVD合格评定程序直接认可为等同。
summary.zht: 中國常見參考標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關但含有國家偏差，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會監督執行。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1出具的檢測及認證，不被歐盟LVD合格評定程序直接認可為等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build an EU conformity file against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-1:2019 testing as evidence for presumption of conformity. Existing Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports do not automatically substitute because scope, deviations, connector assumptions and documentation differ. A Notified Body is not mandatory for LVD; manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File is the normal route. Documentation gap: EU Declaration of Conformity, CE marking, and EU/Portuguese-language technical instructions are all required. The charger configuration must be validated for Portugal's 230/400 V 50 Hz supply, not China's 220/380 V.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕低压指令基本安全要求建立欧盟合规技术文件，并可采用EN IEC 61851-1:2019检测作为推定符合性的证据。现有GB/T 18487.1检测报告不会自动替代，因为范围、偏差、接口假设及文件要求不同。LVD通常不强制要求公告机构；制造商自我声明加技术文件是常规路径。文件差距：需提供欧盟符合性声明、CE标志及欧盟/葡萄牙语技术说明书。充电设备配置须针对葡萄牙230/400 V 50 Hz电源进行验证，而非中国220/380 V。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞低壓指令基本安全要求建立歐盟合規技術文件，並可採用EN IEC 61851-1:2019檢測作為推定符合性的證據。現有GB/T 18487.1檢測報告不會自動替代，因為範圍、偏差、接口假設及文件要求不同。LVD通常不強制要求公告機構；製造商自我聲明加技術文件是常規路徑。文件差距：需提供歐盟符合性聲明、CE標誌及歐盟/葡萄牙語技術說明書。充電設備配置須針對葡萄牙230/400 V 50 Hz電源進行驗證，而非中國220/380 V。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/35/EU and CE marking before Portugal/EU market placement. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is voluntary harmonised-standard evidence for presumption of conformity; alternative technical solutions are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the LVD essential safety requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory before placing EV chargers on the Portugal/EU market. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can grant presumption of conformity for general EV conductive charging; it is not the legal obligation itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 certification does not by itself satisfy the EU conformity assessment pathway; EU evidence against the LVD requirements is needed. Product configuration and labelling must reflect Portugal's 230/400 V 50 Hz supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据LVD 2014/35/EU，在葡萄牙/欧盟市场销售电动汽车充电设备前，CE标志为强制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用于电动汽车传导充电通用要求推定符合性的自愿协调标准，并非法律义务本身。中国GB/T 18487.1认证本身不满足欧盟合格评定路径；仍需提供针对LVD要求的欧盟证据。产品配置和标签须反映葡萄牙230/400 V 50 Hz电源。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據LVD 2014/35/EU，在葡萄牙/歐盟市場銷售電動汽車充電設備前，CE標誌為強制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用於電動汽車傳導充電通用要求推定符合性的自願協調標準，並非法律義務本身。中國GB/T 18487.1認證本身不滿足歐盟合格評定路徑；仍需提供針對LVD要求的歐盟證據。產品配置和標籤須反映葡萄牙230/400 V 50 Hz電源。

requirement_topic.en: DC Charging Station Safety — EV Conductive Charging
requirement_topic.zh: 直流充电站安全——电动汽车传导充电
requirement_topic.zht: 直流充電站安全——電動汽車傳導充電

summary.en: DC charging stations (Mode 4, off-board chargers) placed on the Portugal/EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU where within scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station) is a current product standard that may be used as technical evidence and, where cited as harmonised, gives presumption of conformity; it is not itself the mandatory legal obligation. Key technical topics include isolation monitoring, interlock systems, control pilot functions, maximum voltage/current ratings, and communication protocols for DC supply. For Portugal, the CCS2 (IEC 62196-3) connector is the required public DC charging interface under AFIR.
summary.zh: 投放葡萄牙/欧盟市场的直流充电站（模式4，非车载充电机）在适用范围内须符合低压指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第23部分：直流电动汽车充电站）是现行产品标准，可作为技术证据使用；在被列为协调标准时，可产生推定符合性，但其本身并非强制性法律义务。核心技术主题包括绝缘监控、互锁系统、控制引导功能、最大电压/电流额定值及直流供电通信协议。对于葡萄牙，根据AFIR，CCS2（IEC 62196-3）接口是公共直流充电所需接口。
summary.zht: 投放葡萄牙/歐盟市場的直流充電站（模式4，非車載充電機）在適用範圍內須符合低電壓指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第23部分：直流電動汽車充電站）是現行產品標準，可作為技術證據使用；在被列為協調標準時，可產生推定符合性，但其本身並非強制性法律義務。核心技術主題包括絕緣監控、互鎖系統、控制導引功能、最大電壓/電流額定值及直流供電通訊協議。對於葡萄牙，根據AFIR，CCS2（IEC 62196-3）接口是公共直流充電所需接口。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (current edition, supersedes 2014)
IEC 62196-3 / EN 62196-3 — CCS Combo 2 DC connector (required by AFIR for Portugal/EU public DC charging)

summary.en: China's DC charging station domestic equivalent is GB/T 18487.3-2001 (AC/DC electric vehicle charging station — the only published Part 3 of the 18487 series; note: a GB/T 18487.3-2015 does not exist). The current DC system standard is GB/T 18487.5-2024 (DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 connector). The DC coupler standard is GB/T 20234.3-2023. CQC or CNAS certification to these Chinese standards is not accepted under the EU LVD CE marking pathway.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电站国内对应标准为GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流电动汽车充电站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一发布版本；注：GB/T 18487.3-2015并不存在）。现行直流系统标准为GB/T 18487.5-2024（适用于GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充电系统）。直流耦合器标准为GB/T 20234.3-2023。依据上述中国标准获得的CQC或CNAS认证，在欧盟LVD CE标志合格评定路径下不被接受。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電站國內對應標準為GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流電動汽車充電站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一發布版本；注：GB/T 18487.3-2015並不存在）。現行直流系統標準為GB/T 18487.5-2024（適用於GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充電系統）。直流耦合器標準為GB/T 20234.3-2023。依據上述中國標準獲得的CQC或CNAS認證，在歐盟LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑下不被接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.3-2001 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — AC/DC electric vehicle charging station (only published edition; no 2015 revision exists)
GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 (current DC system standard)
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (supersedes 2015 edition)

gap.en: DC charging stations exported to Portugal/EU should be assessed against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-23:2023 testing as presumption-of-conformity evidence where applicable. Particular attention is needed for: (1) CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) connector compliance required under AFIR for Portuguese public DC charging vs. Chinese GB/T connector; (2) isolation monitoring requirements per European grid topology; and (3) ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC communication compatibility for CCS2 vs. Chinese GB/T 27930 CAN protocol. The connector type itself is a hardware gap — Chinese DC stations typically use GB/T 20234.3 plugs, which are not CCS2 compatible without hardware redesign. Portuguese-language installation and safety documentation is required for E-Redes review.
gap.zh: 出口葡萄牙/欧盟的直流充电站应针对LVD基本安全要求进行评估，并可在适用时采用EN IEC 61851-23:2023检测作为推定符合性证据。重点关注：（1）AFIR要求葡萄牙公共直流充电采用CCS2（组合充电系统2型）连接器，而非中国GB/T连接器；（2）欧洲电网拓扑下的绝缘监控要求；（3）CCS2的ISO 15118/DIN 70121 PLC通信兼容性，而非中国GB/T 27930 CAN协议。连接器本身构成硬件差距——中国直流充电站通常使用GB/T 20234.3插头，未经硬件重新设计无法兼容CCS2。E-Redes审查要求提供葡萄牙语安装和安全文件。
gap.zht: 出口葡萄牙/歐盟的直流充電站應針對LVD基本安全要求進行評估，並可在適用時採用EN IEC 61851-23:2023檢測作為推定符合性證據。重點關注：（1）AFIR要求葡萄牙公共直流充電採用CCS2（組合充電系統2型）連接器，而非中國GB/T連接器；（2）歐洲電網拓撲下的絕緣監控要求；（3）CCS2的ISO 15118/DIN 70121 PLC通訊相容性，而非中國GB/T 27930 CAN協議。連接器本身構成硬體差距——中國直流充電站通常使用GB/T 20234.3插頭，未經硬體重新設計無法相容CCS2。E-Redes審查要求提供葡萄牙語安裝和安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: CE marking under Directive 2014/35/EU where the charger is within LVD scope; CCS2 connector mandatory under AFIR for Portugal/EU public DC charging infrastructure from 13 April 2024. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary technical standard that may support presumption of conformity where harmonised/cited.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 18487.5-2024 is the current DC charging system standard; CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC charging stations require CE marking under the applicable EU legislation, including LVD where in scope. For Portugal/EU public DC charging, CCS2 (IEC 62196-3) connector is mandated by AFIR. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary product standard used as technical evidence or presumption-of-conformity support where harmonised; it is not mandatory in itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.3 certification is not accepted as an EU conformity assessment substitute. A significant hardware gap exists where Chinese DC stations use GB/T connectors incompatible with EU CCS2 practice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直流充电站须依据适用欧盟法律取得CE标志，其中在LVD范围内的产品须符合低压指令。对于葡萄牙/欧盟公共直流充电，AFIR强制要求采用CCS2（IEC 62196-3）接口。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作为技术证据或在协调时用于推定符合性的自愿产品标准，并非自身强制。中国GB/T 18487.3认证不能替代欧盟合格评定。若中国直流充电站使用与欧盟CCS2实践不兼容的GB/T连接器，则存在重大硬件差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直流充電站須依據適用歐盟法律取得CE標誌，其中在LVD範圍內的產品須符合低電壓指令。對於葡萄牙/歐盟公共直流充電，AFIR強制要求採用CCS2（IEC 62196-3）接口。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作為技術證據或在協調時用於推定符合性的自願產品標準，並非自身強制。中國GB/T 18487.3認證不能替代歐盟合格評定。若中國直流充電站使用與歐盟CCS2實務不相容的GB/T連接器，則存在重大硬體差距。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — EV Charging in Buildings (IEC 60364-7-722)
requirement_topic.zh: 建筑内电动汽车充电电气安装安全（IEC 60364-7-722）
requirement_topic.zht: 建築內電動汽車充電電氣安裝安全（IEC 60364-7-722）

summary.en: EU member-state electrical installation law and grid/installer rules govern the building-side circuits supplying EV charging points. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 provide the commonly adopted technical installation route covering protective measures (RCD type B or A+DC detection), wiring, earthing, and load management. In Portugal, electrical installation regulations are set by the RTIEBT (Regras Técnicas das Instalações Elétricas de Baixa Tensão), which is the Portuguese low-voltage electrical installation code adopted under DL 226/2005 and updated by subsequent legislation. E-Redes connection approval (Protocolo de Ligação) requires RTIEBT-compliant installation documentation. These standards apply to the building-side installation infrastructure, not the charger product itself, but exported EV chargers should be compatible with these installation requirements.
summary.zh: 欧盟成员国电气安装法律及电网/安装方规则规范电动汽车充电点的建筑侧供电回路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技术安装路径，涵盖保护措施（B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、布线、接地及负荷管理。在葡萄牙，电气安装规范由RTIEBT（葡萄牙低压电气安装技术规则）规定，依据DL 226/2005及后续立法采用。E-Redes并网审批（Protocolo de Ligação）要求提供符合RTIEBT的安装文件。上述标准适用于建筑侧安装基础设施，而非充电设备产品本身，但出口欧盟/葡萄牙的充电设备应与相关安装要求兼容。
summary.zht: 歐盟成員國電氣安裝法律及電網/安裝方規則規範電動汽車充電點的建築側供電迴路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技術安裝路徑，涵蓋保護措施（B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、布線、接地及負荷管理。在葡萄牙，電氣安裝規範由RTIEBT（葡萄牙低壓電氣安裝技術規則）規定，依據DL 226/2005及後續立法採用。E-Redes並網審批（Protocolo de Ligação）要求提供符合RTIEBT的安裝文件。上述標準適用於建築側安裝基礎設施，而非充電設備產品本身，但出口歐盟/葡萄牙的充電設備應與相關安裝要求相容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364-7-722:2018 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supply of electric vehicles
HD 60364-7-722 (CENELEC harmonised document, adopted by EU member states)
RTIEBT — Regras Técnicas das Instalações Elétricas de Baixa Tensão (Portugal low-voltage electrical installation technical rules, DL 226/2005 and subsequent amendments)

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation primarily through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). These cover site design and installation but differ from IEC 60364-7-722 and Portuguese RTIEBT in RCD type requirements, earthing system assumptions, and load management protocols. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Portuguese RTIEBT or EU member-state installation standards.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜，由住房和城乡建设部负责管理。上述标准涵盖场地设计及安装，但在RCD类型要求、接地系统假设及负荷管理协议方面与IEC 60364-7-722和葡萄牙RTIEBT存在差异。中国安装文件不被接受作为符合葡萄牙RTIEBT或欧盟成员国安装标准的证据。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜，由住房和城鄉建設部負責管理。上述標準涵蓋場地設計及安裝，但在RCD類型要求、接地系統假設及負荷管理協議方面與IEC 60364-7-722和葡萄牙RTIEBT存在差異。中國安裝文件不被接受作為符合葡萄牙RTIEBT或歐盟成員國安裝標準的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD) (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)

gap.en: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 and the Portuguese RTIEBT are installation standards — they govern fixed wiring and protection devices at the building side, not the charger product itself. However, exported EV chargers should declare compatibility with Type B RCDs or incorporate internal DC fault protection to allow Type A RCDs under EU/Portuguese installation practice. A charger that requires installation conditions not achievable under RTIEBT will fail field acceptance by E-Redes. Chinese charger datasheets often omit RCD compatibility statements expected by Portuguese installers, E-Redes, and DGEG. Portuguese-language installation manuals compatible with RTIEBT terminology are required.
gap.zh: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722及葡萄牙RTIEBT为安装标准，规范建筑侧固定布线及保护装置，而非充电设备产品本身。但出口欧盟/葡萄牙的充电设备应依据欧盟/葡萄牙安装实践声明与B型RCD兼容，或内置直流故障保护以允许使用A型RCD。若充电设备要求的安装条件在RTIEBT下无法实现，将无法通过E-Redes现场验收。中国充电设备产品规格书通常未包含葡萄牙安装商、E-Redes和DGEG所期望的RCD兼容性声明。须提供与RTIEBT术语兼容的葡萄牙语安装手册。
gap.zht: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722及葡萄牙RTIEBT為安裝標準，規範建築側固定布線及保護裝置，而非充電設備產品本身。但出口歐盟/葡萄牙的充電設備應依據歐盟/葡萄牙安裝實務聲明與B型RCD相容，或內置直流故障保護以允許使用A型RCD。若充電設備要求的安裝條件在RTIEBT下無法實現，將無法通過E-Redes現場驗收。中國充電設備產品規格書通常未包含葡萄牙安裝商、E-Redes和DGEG所期望的RCD相容性聲明。須提供與RTIEBT術語相容的葡萄牙語安裝手冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation sits in Portuguese electrical installation law (RTIEBT, DL 226/2005) and E-Redes / DGEG grid codes and permitting rules. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 are voluntary or nationally adopted technical standards commonly used to demonstrate accepted installation practice; product compatibility is a practical market requirement for Portugal.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 under MOHURD; not substitutable for Portuguese RTIEBT

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 and Portuguese RTIEBT govern building-side installation practice. EV chargers exported to Portugal/EU should be compatible with the RCD and earthing requirements expected by Portuguese installers, E-Redes, and DGEG. This is distinct from product-level CE marking under LVD, but non-compatibility can block field installation and E-Redes Protocolo de Ligação approval. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes. Portuguese-language installation manuals compatible with RTIEBT are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722及葡萄牙RTIEBT规范建筑侧安装实践。出口葡萄牙/欧盟的充电设备应与葡萄牙安装商、E-Redes和DGEG所期望的RCD和接地要求兼容。这与产品层面依据LVD取得CE标志不同，但不兼容会阻碍现场安装和E-Redes Protocolo de Ligação审批。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。须提供与RTIEBT兼容的葡萄牙语安装手册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722及葡萄牙RTIEBT規範建築側安裝實務。出口葡萄牙/歐盟的充電設備應與葡萄牙安裝商、E-Redes和DGEG所期望的RCD和接地要求相容。這與產品層面依據LVD取得CE標誌不同，但不相容會阻礙現場安裝和E-Redes Protocolo de Ligação審批。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。須提供與RTIEBT相容的葡萄牙語安裝手冊。
